commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And I also have given you cleanness of teeth in all your cities, and lack of bread in all your places: yet have you not returned unto me, says the LORD. Dulness, (stuporem) as when the teeth have bitten at a stone (Haydock) and are edged, Jeremias xxxi. Septuagint, "gnashing. "Hebrew, "cleanness "through want of food. Eliseus foretold a famine under Achab, 4 Kings viii. That of Joel (i. ) seems to have happened later than this. (Calmet) God sent these afflictions for their amendment. (Worthington).
